name: Chocolate Amaretto Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 9-inch quiche dish or round glass baking dish, melt butter at High for 1 minute.
2. Stir in crumbs, nuts, and sugar until combined. Press evenly to coat the bottom and sides of the dish.
3. Microwave the crust at High for 2 minutes or until firm. Set aside.
4. Place chocolate in a small bowl and microwave at Medium for 3 minutes or until melted.
5. Place cream cheese in a microwave-safe mixing bowl and microwave at Medium for 2 minutes or until softened.
6. Add sugar and beat, using an electric mixer, until the mixture is creamy.
7. Beat in sour cream and eggs, one at a time, until smooth.
8. Stir in melted chocolate and Amaretto until well combined.
9. Carefully pour the mixture into the crumb crust.
10. Place the baking dish on an inverted plate in the microwave oven.
11. Microwave uncovered at Medium for 16 - 20 minutes or until nearly set in the center.
12. Let stand on countertop until cool, then refrigerate for at least 8 hours or overnight before serving.
13. For an impressive presentation, serve with sliced strawberries and top with Amaretto-flavored whipped cream.
